title: Drop your SaaS and I’ll check its SEO/AEO readiness
summary: I added a free SEO/AEO report to InkieAI. It checks how ready your SaaS website is for both traditional search engines and AI answer engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI. The report looks at things like: Can Google understand and rank your pages? Can AI tools clearly understand what your product does? Are your landing pages, pricing, features, docs, and CTAs easy to find? What content pages should you create to get discovered by search and AI answers? What competitors and keyw
